name: Hut 8 Corp.
business: Hut 8 is an energy infrastructure platform that integrates power, digital infrastructure, and compute to support AI, HPC, ASIC compute, and other energy-intensive applications. The company develops and operates data centers, provides colocation and cloud services, and manages a Bitcoin accumulation platform through its majority-owned subsidiary American Bitcoin. Revenue is generated from power management, digital infrastructure hosting, compute services (ASIC, traditional cloud, AI cloud), and equipment sales.

exposures.sentence: our core focus is on commercializing this platform primarily through the development and operation of data centers at scale, supporting AI, high-performance computing ( HPC ), ASIC compute, and other energy-intensive technology applications.

our core focus is on commercializing this platform primarily through the development and operation of data centers at scale, supporting AI, high-performance computing ( HPC ), ASIC compute, and other energy-intensive technology applications.

our core focus is on commercializing this platform primarily through the development and operation of data centers at scale, supporting AI, high-performance computing ( HPC ), ASIC compute, and other energy-intensive technology applications.
American Bitcoin, a majority-owned subsidiary of Hut 8, is a publicly listed Bitcoin accumulation platform focused on industrial-scale ASIC compute and the development of a strategic Bitcoin reserve.

We acquire, develop, and manage critical energy assets such as powered land, interconnects, substations, switchyards, and related electrical systems designed to address the load demands of next-generation, energy-intensive technology applications.

Hut 8 Canada provides data center and cloud infrastructure services, including public and private cloud deployments, managed backup, business continuity and disaster recovery services, and high-capacity storage solutions.

catalysts.event: Initial delivery and commissioning of first data hall at River Bend AI data center campus
catalysts.sentence: The project will commercialize 330 MW of utility capacity and is targeted for initial delivery and commissioning in Q2 2027.
The last halving event occurred in April 2024, and the next halving event is expected to occur in 2028.
